purpose: Goethe Theory of Colours chapter smoke — structural + observation matrix against book §§

results.quote: Light, darkness, and a colourless medium
results.goetheSaw: Light + darkness + a colourless semi-transparent medium produce colour; thickness of the medium modulates the appearance.
results.userShouldSee: Low sun through medium: warm near horizon / cool overhead relations; thickness changes colour; bulk water not blue paint at low opacity.
results.caption: §175 — Light, darkness, and a colourless medium
results.visualChecklist: Low sun through medium: warm near horizon / cool overhead relations; thickness changes colour; bulk water not blue paint at low opacity.
